name: Caputo
message: The firm assists businesses in small business accounting, tax preparation, strategic business planning, part-time Chief Financial Officer Services, and assistance in loan proposal preparation to banks among others.We are ready to upload more than 20 GB of essential corporate documents such as: corporate NDA’s, personal SSN’s, internal corporate correspondence, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, driver licenses, corporate licenses, agreements and contracts, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), etc.
